message: JX_WEB_SEARCHER가 수집한 https://github.com/SonAIengine 관련 콘텐츠(README, 저장소 설명, 블로그 글 등)를 깊이 읽고 분석하여 참고할 만한 핵심 인사이트, 기술적 접근 방식, 아이디어, 방법론을 정리하라.

tool_input.prompt:
Fetch the following URLs and return their full content:
1. https://github.com/SonAIengine
2. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SonAIengine/SonAIengine/main/README.md (or any profile README)

For each URL, return the complete raw text content. If a URL fails, try alternative paths like /README.md or ...
Return the complete raw text content of this page, including all visible text, repository listings, bio, and any profile information.
Return the complete raw text content of this README file exactly as it appears, word for word.
